title: RAND: 'How to Avoid an Accidental Nuclear War with North Korea' — 럽비오 국무장관 '새 접근법' 시사, 희토류 협상 제안
snippet: Secretary of State Marco Rubio suggested the United States needs to consider a new approach to reducing the risk of inadvertent nuclear war as a path to the ultimate goal of denuclearization. Kim is in a much stronger political position now than during Trump's first term, firmly aligned with Xi and Putin. Joel Wit's creative economic options include North Korea's rare earth mineral deposits. The U.S. and North Korea could fashion an agreement similar to the U.S.-Ukraine reconstruction investment fund.
tag_reason: 이전 7일 소스에 동일 URL 없음. RAND의 4월 신규 정책 논평으로, 럽비오 국무장관의 '새로운 접근법' 발언과 희토류 협상안이라는 새 외교 옵션을 제시
